title: Project: Vibrant Journeys
description: Adding small details to biomes to make the world feel more alive and dynamic! A Fabric port.
body:
![Header](https://i.imgur.com/sOb6wz3.png)

Description

Project: Vibrant Journeys is an expansive world generation mod that focuses on improving vanilla biomes by adding small details to make the world feel more alive and dynamic! A Fabric port of the original [Project: Vibrant Journeys](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-vibrant-journeys). ![With vs without PVJ](https://i.imgur.com/HgsxmEN.png)

Features

- **Groundcover:** Find rocks, twigs, fallen leaves, bones, pinecones, seashells, and more as you journey across the Minecraft landscape! - **Livelier biomes:** Tall grass variants, fallen trees, bark mushrooms, and nether flora! - **Improved lakes:** Lakes and ponds are a lot less boring with seagrass, cattails, and lilypads! - **Improved beaches:** Beaches are decorated with sea oats, seashells, and beach grass! - **Better ruined Nether portals:** Ruined portals are now flavored and come in soul sand, basalt, warped, and crimson variants! - **Mini-improvements:** cobwebs under tree leaves, tropical fish spawns in jungles, and more! ![taiga](https://i.imgur.com/XcGjKMc.png) ![Rivers and Lakes](https://i.imgur.com/yOUCkgQ.png) ![Icicles](https://i.imgur.com/BNYj5cS.png) ![Nether Portal biomes](https://i.imgur.com/pAoqBqe.png)
